summary: Create an app that enables users to pay/send money.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Minimalist payments app logo, flat vector style, dark-on-light (paymark-logo.dim_512x512.png)
- Abstract finance-themed hero illustration with shapes and subtle texture, light background, warm accent colors (payments-hero.dim_1600x900.png)

existing_features.title: Implement Internet Identity login and session-aware UI so users can sign in/out and the app clearly indicates the currently authenticated user.
Build the core payment UI: a ‘Send payment’ form that lets a signed-in user enter recipient principal, amount, and an optional memo, then submit and receive clear success/error feedback.
Add a dashboard screen showing the signed-in user’s current balance and a transaction history list with sent vs received entries (amount, counterparty, timestamp, memo).
Create a coherent visual theme for a finance/payments app (colors, typography, spacing, component styling) and apply it consistently across all screens without using a blue/purple primary palette.
Add generated static image assets (logo and a simple hero/background illustration) under frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in the UI (e.g., header/logo area and signed-out landing state).

new_feature_requests.summary: Build a money payment app (send/pay money).
Create backend data models and stable storage for user accounts, balances, and a transaction ledger that records transfers between users (sender, recipient, amount, timestamp, memo, unique id).

Implement backend APIs for: (1) getting the caller’s balance, (2) transferring funds from the caller to a specified recipient principal, (3) listing transactions for the caller (sent/received), and (4) (for demo purposes) optionally minting an initial balance for first-time users so they can try sending payments.

Add basic security/abuse controls in the backend: enforce that only the caller can spend the caller’s balance, and rate-limit or otherwise constrain any demo mint/initial-balance feature to prevent repeated farming by the same principal.

projectName: Build a simple in-app money sending (payments) app
